meaning: n.(对野生动物、自然区、古迹和传统事物等的)保护主义者
examples: One promising profession that's emerging this century is wildlife preservationist.
Being a preservationist, he is strongly against destroying the country park for other purposes.
He complained that he was being "stigmatized" as a preservationist-someone opposed to legal hunting.
Both men were stunned that no preservationist or historian spoke up for saving the structure.
Signs of a budding preservationist spirit can be seen even in development-mad Shanghai.
